system.description:
A black, leatherbound tome with a grinning demon face embossed on the cover.

Benefit. A chaotic being who reads this tome gains a level and learns the @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.languages.Item.b5yBrLaRIl7ZEWKu]{Diabolic} language.

A non-chaotic being who reads this book must pass a [[check 18 wis]] check or lose one level.

After being read, the tome teleports to a far-flung location.
